title: YouTube PiP Issues Reported on iPhone and Android
description: Reports indicate YouTube's picture-in-picture mode is experiencing issues on mobile devices, with a fix reportedly in development.

sources.title: YouTube picture-in-picture (PiP) mode is broken on iPhone, Android
YouTube PiP Not Working on iPhone? How to Fix It (2026)
YouTube acknowledges Picture-in-Picture bug on iPhone and Android, fix underway

sections.heading: Current Status of YouTube PiP
paragraphs: According to 9to5Google, YouTube picture-in-picture (PiP) mode is currently broken on both iPhone and Android devices.

sections.heading: Acknowledgment and Fix
paragraphs: Storyboard18 reports that YouTube has acknowledged the Picture-in-Picture bug affecting iPhone and Android users. The source further states that a fix is underway.

sections.heading: Troubleshooting Information
paragraphs: Technobezz has published coverage titled "YouTube PiP Not Working on iPhone? How to Fix It (2026)," addressing the situation for users.

faq.q: Is YouTube PiP working right now?
faq.a: According to 9to5Google, the feature is currently broken on iPhone and Android.
Storyboard18 reports that YouTube has acknowledged the bug and a fix is underway.
